candidates.why: Exact top-line revenue label; matches NET SALES values and is the standard revenue line.
Revenue-like wording but clearly a smaller other operating income component, not total revenue.
Financial income, not operating revenue.

candidates.why: Best match for direct production/service costs and appears as the main operating direct-cost line below revenue.

Balance sheet intangible asset, not COGS.

candidates.row_label: Amortization of Capitalized Research & Development Expenses - Supplemental

Capitalized asset, not income statement R&D expense.

candidates.why: Broad total that includes non-interest items such as FX losses and fair value changes; less preferred than granular recurring components.

candidates.why: Explicit recurring interest expense on debt; strongest XINT component.

Minority share of earnings, not interest expense.

final_choice.row_label: Interest expenses - financial liabilities measured at amortised cost
Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities

variables.notes: Preferred granular recurring finance-cost rows and excluded totals/net rows, FX losses, and fair value changes. Excluded the supplemental lease-interest row to avoid double counting.

candidates.why: Income attribution line, not balance sheet book equity.

Balancing row, not a reported equity measure.

candidates.why: Balancing row, not equity.
